purpose: Brand activation content for Riyadh Season (Oct–Mar). Entertainment-led, experiential, city-energy aesthetic.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

product_or_service.description: Brand product or service to feature in the activation scene

prompt_template: Bold Riyadh nighttime cityscape activation — premium Saudi brand {product_or_service} displayed in dynamic urban Riyadh setting, Riyadh Season visual language (geometric light installations, bold colors, crowd energy implied), modern Saudi aesthetic, no people required, hyper-realistic product hero, shot on 35mm, vibrant warm-cool color contrast {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: daytime lighting (must feel nighttime Riyadh Season energy)
Avoid in output: generic cityscape without Riyadh-specific visual identity
notes: Intents: launch, grow, defend. Saudi adaptation guidance: Riyadh Season runs Oct–Mar and is one of the biggest brand activation windows in the Saudi calendar. Geometric light installations and large-format entertainment structures (e.g., Boulevard Riyadh City, KAFD amphitheater) are the primary visual anchors. Brands use this window for OOH activations and product tie-ins. City energy can be implied through lighting atmosphere rather than explicit crowd. Compliance level: standard.
